'''Kee-Piru Computronics''' was a [[Mon Calamari (language)/Legends|Mon Calamarian]] business that exported a number of native technologies to the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] from its base in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Kee-Piru]]. It manufactured the [[ACCA-1dx000|ACCA-1 dx000]] [[Computer/Legends|computer]]
